name: Fire Bolt
description: Hurl a mote of fire at a creature or object within range, making a ranged spell attack.
higherLevel: Damage increases by 1d10 at 5th, 11th, and 17th level.

name: Sacred Flame
description: Flame-like radiance descends on a creature you can see. The target must succeed on a DEX save or take damage.
higherLevel: Damage increases by 1d8 at 5th, 11th, and 17th level.

name: Eldritch Blast
description: A beam of crackling energy streaks toward a creature within range. Make a ranged spell attack.
higherLevel: Additional beams at 5th (2), 11th (3), and 17th (4) level.

name: Minor Illusion
description: Create a sound or an image of an object within range that lasts for the duration.

name: Prestidigitation
description: A minor magical trick used for practice. Create sensory effects, light or snuff small flames, clean or soil objects, and more.

name: Mage Hand
description: A spectral floating hand appears that can manipulate objects, open doors, or stow items within range.

name: Light
components: V, M (a firefly or phosphorescent moss)
description: Touch an object to make it shed bright light in a 20-foot radius and dim light for an additional 20 feet.

name: Guidance
description: Touch a willing creature to grant it a d4 bonus to one ability check of its choice before the spell ends.

name: Toll the Dead
description: Point at a creature and the sound of a dolorous bell fills the air. Target makes a WIS save or takes necrotic damage.
higherLevel: Damage increases by 1d8 at 5th, 11th, and 17th level. Damage is 1d12 if target is missing HP.

name: Shocking Grasp
description: Lightning springs from your hand to deliver a shock. Make a melee spell attack with advantage if target wears metal armor.
higherLevel: Damage increases by 1d8 at 5th, 11th, and 17th level.

name: Ray of Frost
description: A frigid beam of blue-white light streaks toward a creature. On hit, it takes cold damage and speed is reduced by 10 feet.
higherLevel: Damage increases by 1d8 at 5th, 11th, and 17th level.

name: Chill Touch
description: A ghostly skeletal hand strikes at a creature. On hit, the target can't regain HP until start of your next turn.
higherLevel: Damage increases by 1d8 at 5th, 11th, and 17th level.

name: Vicious Mockery
description: Unleash a string of insults laced with subtle enchantments. On a failed WIS save, the target takes psychic damage and has disadvantage on next attack.
higherLevel: Damage increases by 1d4 at 5th, 11th, and 17th level.

name: Thaumaturgy
description: Manifest a minor wonder, such as booming voice, trembling ground, flickering flames, or slamming doors.

name: Spare the Dying
description: Touch a living creature at 0 HP to stabilize it. Has no effect on undead or constructs.

name: Mending
description: Repair a single break or tear in an object you touch, such as a broken chain link or a torn cloak.

name: Message
components: V, S, M (a short piece of copper wire)
description: Whisper a message to a target creature within range. Only the target hears it and can reply in a whisper.

name: Produce Flame
description: A flickering flame appears in your hand, shedding bright light in 10 feet. You can hurl it as a ranged spell attack.
higherLevel: Damage increases by 1d8 at 5th, 11th, and 17th level.

name: Druidcraft
description: Create a tiny harmless sensory effect that predicts weather, bloom a flower, create a sensory effect, or light/snuff a small flame.

name: Sorcerous Burst
description: A burst of chaotic magical energy leaps from you toward a creature. Make a ranged spell attack dealing random elemental damage.
higherLevel: Damage increases by 1d8 at 5th, 11th, and 17th level.

name: Magic Missile
description: Three glowing darts of magical force unerringly strike targets you choose within range. Each dart deals 1d4+1 force damage.
higherLevel: One additional dart per slot level above 1st.

name: Shield
description: An invisible barrier of magical force protects you, granting +5 to AC until the start of your next turn, including against the triggering attack.

name: Cure Wounds
description: Touch a creature to restore hit points equal to 1d8 + your spellcasting ability modifier.
higherLevel: Healing increases by 1d8 per slot level above 1st.

name: Healing Word
description: Speak a word of healing to a creature within range, restoring 1d4 + your spellcasting modifier hit points.
higherLevel: Healing increases by 1d4 per slot level above 1st.

name: Guiding Bolt
description: A flash of light streaks toward a creature. On hit, deals radiant damage and the next attack roll against it has advantage.
higherLevel: Damage increases by 1d6 per slot level above 1st.

name: Thunderwave
description: A wave of thunderous force sweeps out from you. Creatures in a 15-foot cube take thunder damage and are pushed 10 feet.
higherLevel: Damage increases by 1d8 per slot level above 1st.

name: Burning Hands
description: A thin sheet of flames shoots forth from your outstretched fingertips in a 15-foot cone.
higherLevel: Damage increases by 1d6 per slot level above 1st.

name: Detect Magic
description: Sense the presence of magic within 30 feet. You can use your action to see a faint aura around any visible magical creature or object.

name: Mage Armor
components: V, S, M (a piece of cured leather)
description: Touch a willing creature not wearing armor to surround it with a protective magical force. Its base AC becomes 13 + DEX modifier.

name: Sleep
components: V, S, M (a pinch of fine sand, rose petals, or a cricket)
description: Send creatures into a magical slumber. Roll 5d8; the total is how many HP of creatures this spell can affect, starting with the lowest current HP.
higherLevel: Roll an additional 2d8 per slot level above 1st.

name: Charm Person
description: Attempt to charm a humanoid you can see. It makes a WIS save with advantage if you or allies are fighting it.
higherLevel: Target one additional creature per slot level above 1st.

name: Bless
components: V, S, M (a sprinkling of holy water)
description: Bless up to three creatures, granting them a d4 bonus to attack rolls and saving throws for the duration.
higherLevel: One additional creature per slot level above 1st.

name: Command
description: Speak a one-word command to a creature you can see. It must succeed on a WIS save or follow the command on its next turn.
higherLevel: Target one additional creature per slot level above 1st.

name: Faerie Fire
description: Objects and creatures in a 20-foot cube are outlined in light. Affected creatures shed dim light and attacks against them have advantage.

name: Hex
components: V, S, M (the petrified eye of a newt)
description: Curse a creature. Your attacks deal an extra 1d6 necrotic damage to it, and it has disadvantage on one chosen ability check.
higherLevel: Duration increases with higher slots: 8 hours at 3rd, 24 hours at 5th.

name: Hunter's Mark
description: Mark a creature as your quarry. Your weapon attacks deal an extra 1d6 damage to it, and you have advantage on tracking it.
higherLevel: Duration increases with higher slots: 8 hours at 3rd, 24 hours at 5th.

name: Inflict Wounds
description: Make a melee spell attack. On hit, the target takes 3d10 necrotic damage.
higherLevel: Damage increases by 1d10 per slot level above 1st.

name: Identify
components: V, S, M (a pearl worth at least 100 gp and an owl feather)
description: Learn the properties of a magic item or learn what spells are affecting a creature you touch.

name: Chromatic Orb
components: V, S, M (a diamond worth at least 50 gp)
description: Hurl a 4-inch sphere of energy at a creature, choosing acid, cold, fire, lightning, poison, or thunder damage.
higherLevel: Damage increases by 1d8 per slot level above 1st.

name: Color Spray
components: V, S, M (a pinch of powder or sand, colored red, yellow, and blue)
description: A dazzling array of flashing colors springs from your hand. Roll 6d10; creatures in a 15-foot cone are blinded based on their current HP.
higherLevel: Roll an additional 2d10 per slot level above 1st.

name: Disguise Self
description: Make yourself look different, including clothing, armor, weapons, and other belongings. Investigation check to discern the disguise.

name: Feather Fall
components: V, M (a small feather or piece of down)
description: Choose up to five falling creatures within range. Their rate of descent slows to 60 feet per round, taking no falling damage.

name: Find Familiar
components: V, S, M (10 gp worth of charcoal, incense, and herbs consumed in a brass brazier)
description: Gain the service of a familiar, a spirit that takes an animal form you choose. You can communicate telepathically and perceive through its senses.

name: Fog Cloud
description: Create a 20-foot-radius sphere of fog centered on a point within range. The area is heavily obscured.
higherLevel: Radius increases by 20 feet per slot level above 1st.

name: Grease
components: V, S, M (a bit of pork rind or butter)
description: Slick grease covers the ground in a 10-foot square. Creatures in the area must succeed on a DEX save or fall prone.

name: Longstrider
components: V, S, M (a pinch of dirt)
description: Touch a creature to increase its speed by 10 feet for the duration.
higherLevel: Target one additional creature per slot level above 1st.

name: Protection from Evil and Good
components: V, S, M (holy water or powdered silver and iron)
description: Protect a creature from aberrations, celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead. They have disadvantage on attacks against the target.

name: Sanctuary
components: V, S, M (a small silver mirror)
description: Ward a creature. Any creature that targets the warded creature with an attack or harmful spell must make a WIS save or choose a new target.

name: Tasha's Hideous Laughter
components: V, S, M (tiny tarts and a feather)
description: A creature falls prone in an incapacitating fit of laughter on a failed WIS save. It can repeat the save at end of each turn.

name: Witch Bolt
components: V, S, M (a twig from a tree that has been struck by lightning)
description: A beam of crackling blue energy lances toward a creature. On hit, deals lightning damage and you can use your action to automatically deal 1d12 on subsequent turns.
higherLevel: Initial damage increases by 1d12 per slot level above 1st.

name: Spiritual Weapon
description: Create a floating spectral weapon that makes a melee spell attack dealing force damage. Move it and attack as a bonus action each turn.
higherLevel: Damage increases by 1d8 for every two slot levels above 2nd.

name: Scorching Ray
description: Create three rays of fire and hurl them at targets within range. Make a ranged spell attack for each ray.
higherLevel: One additional ray per slot level above 2nd.

name: Misty Step
description: Briefly surrounded by silvery mist, you teleport up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space that you can see.

name: Hold Person
components: V, S, M (a small piece of iron)
description: Paralyze a humanoid on a failed WIS save. The target can repeat the save at the end of each of its turns.
higherLevel: Target one additional humanoid per slot level above 2nd.

name: Shatter
components: V, S, M (a chip of mica)
description: A sudden loud ringing noise erupts from a point within range. Creatures in a 10-foot sphere take thunder damage.
higherLevel: Damage increases by 1d8 per slot level above 2nd.

name: Invisibility
components: V, S, M (an eyelash encased in gum arabic)
description: A creature you touch becomes invisible until the spell ends. The spell ends early if the target attacks or casts a spell.
higherLevel: Target one additional creature per slot level above 2nd.

name: Lesser Restoration
description: Touch a creature to end one disease or condition affecting it: blinded, deafened, paralyzed, or poisoned.

name: Aid
components: V, S, M (a tiny strip of white cloth)
description: Bolster up to three creatures with toughness and resolve. Each target's HP maximum and current HP increase by 5.
higherLevel: HP increase rises by 5 per slot level above 2nd.

name: Darkness
components: V, M (bat fur and a drop of pitch or piece of coal)
description: Magical darkness spreads from a point within range, filling a 15-foot-radius sphere. Darkvision cannot see through it.

name: Web
components: V, S, M (a bit of spiderweb)
description: Conjure a mass of thick sticky webbing in a 20-foot cube. Creatures entering or starting their turn there must make a DEX save or be restrained.

name: Mirror Image
description: Three illusory duplicates of yourself appear. When attacked, there's a chance the attack targets a duplicate instead.

name: Dragon's Breath
description: Touch a willing creature and choose acid, cold, fire, lightning, or poison. It can use an action to exhale a 15-foot cone of that damage type.
higherLevel: Damage increases by 1d6 per slot level above 2nd.

name: Spider Climb
components: V, S, M (a drop of bitumen and a spider)
description: A willing creature gains the ability to move up, down, and across vertical surfaces and ceilings, with a climbing speed equal to its walking speed.

name: Suggestion
components: V, M (a snake's tongue and a bit of honeycomb)
description: Suggest a course of activity to a creature that can hear and understand you. On a failed WIS save, it pursues that activity.

name: Blindness/Deafness
description: Blind or deafen a creature on a failed CON save. The target can repeat the save at the end of each of its turns.
higherLevel: Target one additional creature per slot level above 2nd.

name: Calm Emotions
description: Suppress strong emotions in a 20-foot sphere. You can suppress charm/frighten effects or make hostile creatures indifferent.

name: Enlarge/Reduce
components: V, S, M (a pinch of powdered iron)
description: Cause a creature or object to grow larger or smaller. Enlarge grants advantage on STR checks and +1d4 weapon damage; Reduce gives disadvantage and -1d4.

name: Flaming Sphere
components: V, S, M (a bit of tallow, a pinch of brimstone, and a dusting of powdered iron)
description: A 5-foot-diameter sphere of fire appears. Creatures ending their turn within 5 feet take fire damage on a failed DEX save. You can move it as a bonus action.
higherLevel: Damage increases by 1d6 per slot level above 2nd.

name: Heat Metal
components: V, S, M (a piece of iron and a flame)
description: Cause a metal object to glow red-hot. A creature in contact with it takes fire damage and must drop it or have disadvantage on attacks and checks.
higherLevel: Damage increases by 1d8 per slot level above 2nd.

name: Moonbeam
components: V, S, M (several seeds of any moonseed plant and a piece of opalescent feldspar)
description: A silvery beam of pale light shines down in a 5-foot-radius, 40-foot-high cylinder. Creatures in it make a CON save or take radiant damage. Shapechangers have disadvantage.
higherLevel: Damage increases by 1d10 per slot level above 2nd.

name: Pass Without Trace
components: V, S, M (ashes from a burned leaf of mistletoe and a sprig of spruce)
description: A veil of shadows and silence radiates from you. Each creature you choose within 30 feet gains a +10 bonus to Stealth checks.

name: Silence
description: Create a 20-foot-radius sphere of silence. No sound can be created within or pass through it. Creatures inside are immune to thunder damage and deafened.

name: Zone of Truth
description: Create a 15-foot-radius sphere where creatures that fail a CHA save can't speak deliberate lies.

name: Fireball
components: V, S, M (a tiny ball of bat guano and sulfur)
description: A bright streak flashes from your pointing finger to a point within range and then blossoms into an explosion of flame.
higherLevel: Damage increases by 1d6 per slot level above 3rd.

name: Lightning Bolt
components: V, S, M (a bit of fur and a rod of amber, crystal, or glass)
description: A stroke of lightning forming a 100-foot line, 5 feet wide, blasts out from you in a direction you choose.
higherLevel: Damage increases by 1d6 per slot level above 3rd.

name: Counterspell
description: Attempt to interrupt a creature casting a spell. If the spell is 3rd level or lower, it automatically fails. Higher-level spells require an ability check.
higherLevel: Automatically counters spells of the slot level used or lower.

name: Dispel Magic
description: End one spell on a target. If the spell is 3rd level or lower, it ends automatically. Higher-level spells require an ability check.
higherLevel: Automatically dispels spells of the slot level used or lower.

name: Spirit Guardians
description: Spirits flit around you in a 15-foot radius. Creatures of your choice that enter or start their turn there take radiant or necrotic damage and have halved speed.
higherLevel: Damage increases by 1d8 per slot level above 3rd.

name: Haste
components: V, S, M (a shaving of licorice root)
description: A willing creature gains doubled speed, +2 AC, advantage on DEX saves, and an additional action each turn. When it ends, the target is lethargic for one round.

name: Revivify
components: V, S, M (diamonds worth 300 gp, which the spell consumes)
description: Touch a creature that has died within the last minute. It returns to life with 1 HP. Cannot restore missing body parts.

name: Fly
components: V, S, M (a wing feather from any bird)
description: Touch a willing creature to grant it a flying speed of 60 feet for the duration. The target falls if the spell ends while airborne.
higherLevel: Target one additional creature per slot level above 3rd.

name: Hypnotic Pattern
components: S, M (a glowing stick of incense or a crystal vial filled with phosphorescent material)
description: Create a twisting pattern of colors in a 30-foot cube. Creatures that see it must make a WIS save or become charmed, incapacitated, and have speed 0.

name: Fear
components: V, S, M (a white feather or the heart of a hen)
description: Project a phantasmal image of a creature's worst fears. Each creature in a 30-foot cone must make a WIS save or drop what it's holding and become frightened.

name: Animate Dead
components: V, S, M (a drop of blood, a piece of flesh, and a pinch of bone dust)
description: Create an undead servant from a pile of bones or a corpse. The creature becomes a skeleton or zombie under your control for 24 hours.
higherLevel: Animate or reassert control over two additional undead per slot level above 3rd.

name: Bestow Curse
description: Touch a creature to bestow a curse. On a failed WIS save, choose an effect: disadvantage on checks/saves, wasted turns, or extra necrotic damage from your attacks.
higherLevel: Duration extends: 10 min at 4th, 8 hours at 5th, 24 hours at 7th, permanent at 9th.

name: Call Lightning
description: A storm cloud appears and you call down a bolt of lightning on a point beneath it. Creatures within 5 feet of that point make a DEX save.
higherLevel: Damage increases by 1d10 per slot level above 3rd.

name: Daylight
description: A 60-foot-radius sphere of bright light spreads from a point you choose. It dispels any darkness in the area created by spells of 3rd level or lower.

name: Mass Healing Word
description: Up to six creatures of your choice within range each regain hit points equal to 1d4 + your spellcasting modifier.
higherLevel: Healing increases by 1d4 per slot level above 3rd.

name: Plant Growth
description: Cause plants in a 100-foot radius to become thick and overgrown, making the area difficult terrain. Or enrich plants in a half-mile radius for a year.

name: Sending
components: V, S, M (a short piece of fine copper wire)
description: Send a short message of 25 words or fewer to a creature you are familiar with. The creature can reply in kind.

name: Slow
components: V, S, M (a drop of molasses)
description: Alter time around up to six creatures in a 40-foot cube. On a failed WIS save, targets have halved speed, -2 AC, -2 DEX saves, and can't use reactions.

name: Speak with Dead
description: Grant the semblance of life to a corpse, allowing you to ask it up to five questions. The corpse knows only what it knew in life.

name: Spirit Shroud
description: Spirits of the dead surround you. Your attacks deal extra radiant, necrotic, or cold damage, and creatures within 10 feet can't regain HP.
higherLevel: Damage increases by 1d8 for every two slot levels above 3rd.

name: Tongues
components: V, M (a small clay model of a ziggurat)
description: Grant the touched creature the ability to understand any spoken language it hears and to speak so that any creature understands it.

name: Water Breathing
components: V, S, M (a short reed or piece of straw)
description: Grant up to ten willing creatures the ability to breathe underwater for the duration. They retain normal respiration as well.

name: Banishment
components: V, S, M (an item distasteful to the target)
description: Banish a creature to a harmless demiplane on a failed CHA save. If native to another plane, it returns there permanently after 1 minute.
higherLevel: Target one additional creature per slot level above 4th.

name: Dimension Door
description: Teleport yourself and one willing creature of your size or smaller to a destination within 500 feet that you can visualize or describe.

name: Greater Invisibility
description: A creature you touch becomes invisible for the duration. Unlike Invisibility, the spell doesn't end when the target attacks or casts a spell.

name: Polymorph
description: Transform a creature into a new beast form. The target assumes the beast's HP and statistics. Reverts when reduced to 0 HP.

name: Guardian of Faith
description: A Large spectral guardian appears and occupies a space. Hostile creatures within 10 feet take radiant damage on a failed DEX save. Dissipates after dealing 60 damage.

name: Wall of Fire
components: V, S, M (a small piece of phosphorus)
description: Create a wall of fire on a solid surface. One side of the wall deals fire damage to creatures within 10 feet and to those passing through it.
higherLevel: Damage increases by 1d8 per slot level above 4th.

name: Ice Storm
components: V, S, M (a pinch of dust and a few drops of water)
description: A hail of rock-hard ice pounds to the ground in a 20-foot cylinder. Creatures take bludgeoning and cold damage, and the area becomes difficult terrain.
higherLevel: Bludgeoning damage increases by 1d8 per slot level above 4th.

name: Blight
description: Necromantic energy washes over a creature, draining moisture and vitality. Plant creatures and magical plants have disadvantage on the save.
higherLevel: Damage increases by 1d8 per slot level above 4th.

name: Fabricate
description: Convert raw materials into products of the same material. You can fabricate a Large or smaller object, or up to a 10-foot cube of material.

name: Freedom of Movement
components: V, S, M (a leather strap, bound around the arm or a similar appendage)
description: Touch a willing creature. Its movement is unaffected by difficult terrain, and spells and effects can't reduce its speed or paralyze or restrain it.

name: Stoneskin
components: V, S, M (diamond dust worth 100 gp, which the spell consumes)
description: A willing creature's flesh becomes as hard as stone, granting resistance to nonmagical bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage.

name: Raise Dead
components: V, S, M (a diamond worth at least 500 gp, which the spell consumes)
description: Return a dead creature to life that has been dead no more than 10 days. It returns with 1 HP and suffers penalties for several days.

name: Greater Restoration
components: V, S, M (diamond dust worth at least 100 gp, which the spell consumes)
description: Imbue a creature with positive energy to undo a debilitating effect: reduce exhaustion, end charm/petrify/curse, or restore ability score or HP maximum.

name: Mass Cure Wounds
description: A wave of healing energy washes out from a point. Up to six creatures in a 30-foot sphere each regain 3d8 + modifier hit points.
higherLevel: Healing increases by 1d8 per slot level above 5th.

name: Wall of Force
components: V, S, M (a pinch of powder made by crushing a clear gemstone)
description: An invisible wall of force springs into existence. It can be a sphere or flat panels. Nothing can physically pass through it. Immune to all damage.

name: Cone of Cold
components: V, S, M (a small crystal or glass cone)
description: A blast of cold air erupts from your hands in a 60-foot cone. Creatures in the area take cold damage; killed creatures become frozen statues.
higherLevel: Damage increases by 1d8 per slot level above 5th.

name: Flame Strike
components: V, S, M (a pinch of sulfur)
description: A vertical column of divine fire roars down from the heavens in a 10-foot-radius, 40-foot-high cylinder. Deals fire and radiant damage.
higherLevel: Fire damage increases by 1d6 per slot level above 5th.

name: Hold Monster
components: V, S, M (a small piece of iron)
description: Paralyze any creature (not just humanoids) on a failed WIS save. The target can repeat the save at the end of each of its turns.
higherLevel: Target one additional creature per slot level above 5th.

name: Telekinesis
description: Move a creature or object up to 1,000 pounds with your mind. You can exert fine control or hurl creatures with a contested check.

name: Animate Objects
description: Objects come to life at your command. Animate up to ten nonmagical objects which obey your verbal commands and can attack.
higherLevel: Animate two additional objects per slot level above 5th.

name: Cloudkill
description: Create a 20-foot-radius sphere of poisonous yellow-green fog. Creatures in the cloud must make a CON save or take poison damage.
higherLevel: Damage increases by 1d8 per slot level above 5th.

name: Synaptic Static
description: Psychic energy explodes in a 20-foot sphere. On a failed INT save, creatures take psychic damage and subtract 1d6 from attack rolls, checks, and concentration saves.

name: Heal
description: A creature you choose regains 70 hit points. Also ends blindness, deafness, and any diseases affecting the target.
higherLevel: Healing increases by 10 per slot level above 6th.

name: Chain Lightning
components: V, S, M (a bit of fur, a piece of amber, glass, or crystal rod, and three silver pins)
description: A bolt of lightning arcs toward a target then jumps to up to three additional targets within 30 feet of the first.
higherLevel: One additional target per slot level above 6th.

name: Disintegrate
components: V, S, M (a lodestone and a pinch of dust)
description: A thin green ray springs from your finger. On a failed DEX save, the target takes massive force damage. If reduced to 0 HP, it is disintegrated.
higherLevel: Damage increases by 3d6 per slot level above 6th.

name: Globe of Invulnerability
components: V, S, M (a glass or crystal bead that shatters when the spell ends)
description: An immobile 10-foot-radius shimmering barrier surrounds you. Any spell of 5th level or lower cast from outside cannot affect anything within it.
higherLevel: Blocks spells of one level higher per slot level above 6th.

name: Mass Suggestion
components: V, M (a snake's tongue and a bit of honeycomb)
description: Suggest a course of activity to up to twelve creatures that can hear and understand you. On a failed WIS save, each pursues that activity.
higherLevel: Duration increases: 10 days at 7th, 30 days at 8th, permanent at 9th.

name: Sunbeam
description: A beam of brilliant light flashes out from your hand in a 5-foot-wide, 60-foot-long line. Creatures make a CON save or take radiant damage and are blinded.

name: True Seeing
components: V, S, M (an ointment for the eyes worth 25 gp, made from mushroom powder, saffron, and fat, which the spell consumes)
description: Grant a creature truesight out to 120 feet, allowing it to see through illusions, darkness, invisibility, and into the Ethereal Plane.

name: Wall of Ice
components: V, S, M (a small piece of quartz)
description: Create a wall of ice on a solid surface. Creatures caught in its space make a DEX save or take cold damage. The wall can be destroyed section by section.
higherLevel: Damage increases by 2d6 per slot level above 6th.

name: Resurrection
components: V, S, M (a diamond worth at least 1,000 gp, which the spell consumes)
description: Touch a dead creature that has been dead no more than a century. It returns to life with all HP, and all diseases and poisons are neutralized.

name: Teleport
description: Transport yourself and up to eight willing creatures to a destination you specify. Accuracy depends on how familiar you are with the destination.

name: Plane Shift
components: V, S, M (a forked metal rod worth at least 250 gp, attuned to a particular plane)
description: Transport yourself and up to eight willing creatures to another plane of existence, or banish an unwilling creature with a melee spell attack and CHA save.

name: Finger of Death
description: Send negative energy coursing through a creature. On a failed CON save, it takes massive necrotic damage. A humanoid killed by this spell rises as a zombie.

name: Fire Storm
description: A storm of fire rains down in up to ten 10-foot cubes you arrange within range. Creatures in the area make a DEX save.

name: Forcecage
components: V, S, M (ruby dust worth 1,500 gp)
description: An immobile invisible cube-shaped prison of force springs into existence. It can be a cage of bars or a solid box. Teleportation requires a CHA save.

name: Reverse Gravity
components: V, S, M (a lodestone and iron filings)
description: Reverse gravity in a 50-foot-radius, 100-foot-high cylinder. Unattached objects and creatures fall upward. A DEX save lets a creature grab something.

name: Dominate Monster
description: Attempt to charm any creature on a failed WIS save. You have a telepathic link and can command its actions on your turn.
higherLevel: Duration increases to 8 hours at 9th level.

name: Earthquake
components: V, S, M (a pinch of dirt, a piece of rock, and a lump of clay)
description: Create a seismic disturbance in a 100-foot-radius area. Creatures must make DEX saves or be knocked prone. Structures take 50 bludgeoning damage per round.

name: Feeblemind
components: V, S, M (a handful of clay, crystal, glass, or mineral spheres)
description: Blast the mind of a creature, dealing psychic damage on a failed INT save. Its INT and CHA become 1, and it can't cast spells or understand language.

name: Power Word Stun
description: Speak a word of power that stuns a creature with 150 HP or fewer. It makes a CON save at the end of each turn to end the effect.

name: Sunburst
components: V, S, M (fire and a piece of sunstone)
description: Brilliant sunlight flashes in a 60-foot radius. Creatures make a CON save or take radiant damage and are blinded for 1 minute.

name: Antimagic Field
components: V, S, M (a pinch of powdered iron or iron filings)
description: A 10-foot-radius invisible sphere of antimagic surrounds you. Within the sphere, spells can't be cast, magic items become mundane, and magical effects are suppressed.

name: Power Word Kill
description: Utter a word of power that instantly kills a creature with 100 HP or fewer. No save.

name: Wish
description: The mightiest spell a mortal can cast. Duplicate any 8th-level or lower spell, or create any effect your DM allows, with potential risks.

name: Meteor Swarm
description: Blazing orbs of fire plummet to the ground at four different points. Each creature in a 40-foot sphere at each point takes fire and bludgeoning damage.

name: True Resurrection
components: V, S, M (a sprinkle of holy water and diamonds worth at least 25,000 gp, which the spell consumes)
description: Restore to life a creature that has been dead for no longer than 200 years. It returns with all HP, and all curses, diseases, and poisons are neutralized. Even provides a new body if needed.

name: Gate
components: V, S, M (a diamond worth at least 5,000 gp)
description: Conjure a portal linking your location to a precise location on a different plane of existence. You can also name a specific creature to draw it through.

name: Time Stop
description: Briefly stop the flow of time for everyone but yourself. You take 1d4+1 turns in a row, but the spell ends if you affect another creature or object.

name: Mass Heal
description: A flood of healing energy flows from you into injured creatures around you. Restore up to 700 HP divided among any number of creatures within range. Also cures diseases, blindness, and deafness.
